description_long: This armchair features a modern, enveloping design with a deep, curved backrest and integrated armrests that flow smoothly into the seat. The upholstery is a rich, dark green fabric with a matte, velvety texture, giving it a sophisticated and inviting appearance. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and support, while the armrests are wide and gently sloped. The chair stands on four slender, tapered legs finished in black, which contrast elegantly with the upholstery and add a touch of contemporary style. The overall silhouette is sleek and slightly flared, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings. The construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the plush exterior.
description: A modern, dark green upholstered armchair with a curved backrest, integrated armrests, and slender black tapered legs. The chair has a plush, velvety texture and a sleek, contemporary silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved backrest, integrated armrests, and plush seat with all four black tapered legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous curve of the backrest and armrest, as well as the depth of the seat and the slender profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded backrest and the symmetrical flare of the chair's sides, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the armrest's gentle slope and the chair's overall depth and curvature.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, integrated with the backrest, gently sloped
attribute_backrest_style: high, wide, and smoothly curved with a continuous flow into the armrests
attribute_leg_type: slender, tapered, black-finished legs, likely wood or metal
